_publications._publicationTitle: Transplanting neurofibromatosis-1 gene knockout neural stem cells improve functional recovery in rats with spinal cord injury by enhancing the mTORC2 pathway.

_contextSnippet: Compared with those of the SCI+LV-vector NSC group, the counts of NF-200-, MAP2- and β3-Tubulin-positive cells in the SCI+LV-NF-1 NSC group were 1.8-, 2.1-, and 2.2-fold greater, respectively
details: Successfully detected neurofilament outgrowth marker NF-200, with counts in SCI+LV-NF-1 NSC group being 1.8-fold greater than SCI+LV-vector NSC group
